channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: JPY Rallies on 34-Year Wage Peak & Finance Ministry Intervention Warnings
item.description: London is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the European session. Japanese Yen (JPY) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: GBP/USD Eyes 1.3500 as Iran Deal Lifts Risk Mood, Fed Fears Dent USD
item.description: GBP/USD pushed above 1.3450 and approached 1.3500 at the London open as Iran peace deal progress triggered broad risk-on appetite, while growing fears over Federal Reserve independence kept dollar selling pressure elevated.
